query:
-- Get ALL services with $49 cost (the known placeholder amount) with full context
SELECT 
  c.name as customer,
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.dataSource,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.serviceType,
  LEFT(s.discoveryNotes, 80) as notes
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.monthlyCost = 49.00
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost ASC;
